name: registry tracks last_modified timestamp per entry so operator can see freshness of each source
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: cfpb, last_modified: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/show-registry.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --field last_modified 2>out.txt && grep -q 'id=cfpb last_modified=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
